_description: Practical labeling guide for LLM ensemble. Helps assign bits, themes, and tags quickly and accurately. Updated 2026-03-24 with Grok TPOT-native feedback + Chrome audit of 26 accounts.
_usage: Loaded by label_tweets_ensemble.py. The LLM sees this to understand the TPOT space and avoid common misassignments.

communities._note: 15 DB communities. Use short_names for bits:ShortName:+N tags. Descriptions include WHAT TO LOOK FOR and WHAT NOT TO CONFUSE IT WITH.

LLM-Whisperers.look_for: Probing model psychology, coaxing emergent behaviors, recursive prompting, treating AI as cognitive entity. Prompt sorcery, jailbreaking as epistemics, model consciousness speculation.
LLM-Whisperers.not_this: Training/fine-tuning models (that's Open-Source-AI emerging cluster). Using AI as a tool without psychological curiosity. Corporate AI product talk.

Qualia-Research.look_for: Consciousness geometry, valence formalism, phenomenological self-experimentation, 'what it feels like from the inside.' QRI-adjacent, symmetry theories of valence.
Qualia-Research.not_this: General use of 'mind' or 'brain.' Neuroscience without phenomenology. Meditation practice (that's Contemplative).

AI-Safety.look_for: Alignment research, forecasting, x-risk, EA, cause prioritization, AI governance, institutional critique. Quantitative rigor, calibration, Brier scores. Post-EA drift counts.
AI-Safety.not_this: Using AI safely (product safety). Climate/biosecurity without AI angle. Pure philosophy without quantitative bent.
AI-Safety.includes: Technical alignment researchers AND forecasting/impacts people (Katja Grace style) — do NOT split these, same social graph.
AI-Safety.sub_facets: alignment-theory, mech-interp, agent-foundations, ai-governance, pause-ai, e-acc, d-acc, s-risk, forecasting, field-building

Contemplative-Practitioners.look_for: Jhana practice, IFS, somatic healing, breathwork, nondual awakening, meditation as first-person science. Direct experience over belief. Nervous system regulation.
Contemplative-Practitioners.not_this: Talking ABOUT meditation without practice. Wellness influencer content. Using meditation vocabulary metaphorically.
Contemplative-Practitioners.boundary: Distinct from Qualia-Research (which maps consciousness formally) and Somatic-Coaching (which is professional facilitation, not personal practice).

highbies.look_for: Absurdist observational humor that goes viral. Niche obsessions consumed for pure enjoyment. Crowdsourcing life decisions. Engineering framing of social rituals. High-agency weirdness.
highbies.not_this: Generic funny tweets. Political humor. Meme accounts without intellectual depth.

Core-TPOT.look_for: The STYLE matters: profound ideas crashing into absurd humor, personal essays mixing with divine absurdity, arguing/memeing/flirting at 3am. If the tweet could be from any smart person on generic Twitter, it's NOT Core-TPOT.
Core-TPOT.not_this: Default bucket for 'this person is on TPOT.' Require the distinctive posting style. Pure AI discourse. Pure rationalism.
Core-TPOT.usage_note: Only assign Core-TPOT:+2 or higher when the tweet exhibits the TPOT posting style — not just TPOT adjacency. Use sparingly.

AI-Creativity.look_for: AI as creative partner, generative art, synthetic personas, surreal digital rituals. Code as brushstrokes, entropy as beauty. Agent-based performance art.
AI-Creativity.not_this: Using DALL-E to make a picture. AI productivity tools. Open-source model training.

Quiet-Creatives.look_for: Personal creative output as daily practice. Stream-of-consciousness posting about daily life as genuine connection. Paper-and-flame energy. Reflective coding stories. Personal crisis becomes art.
Quiet-Creatives.not_this: Loud confessional writing (that might be Relational-Explorers). Professional writers/journalists. Any smart person who writes well.

Collective-Intelligence.look_for: DAO alchemy, regenerative coordination, mycelial network design. Open-source ecologies, Game B infrastructure. Metacrisis/polycrisis engagement. Neo-Buddhist coordination. ALL the chronically online intellectual ecosystem counts — metamodern, integral, regenerative, Game B are PART of extended TPOT.
Collective-Intelligence.not_this: The PHRASE 'collective intelligence' used casually. Corporate coordination/collaboration tools.
Collective-Intelligence.note: This community has high absorption because it bridges into a large ecosystem. That absorption is REAL SIGNAL — these adjacent communities ARE part of the map. Do not be overly conservative.

NYC-Institution-Builders.look_for: LITERAL NYC — housing reform, friend-cluster engineering, raising kids in the city, spaced repetition on toddlers, Uniqlo uniform advice. Building at every scale: cities, schools, families, daily rituals.
NYC-Institution-Builders.not_this: Abstract 'institutional design' or governance. AGI-ready institutions. 'Building institutions' in the metaphorical sense. Anything not specifically NYC.

Queer-TPOT.look_for: Queer identity + tech + high-openness weird intellectualism. Gender as mutable medium, xenocognitive identity shifts, prismatic self-creation.
Queer-TPOT.note: Cross-cutting identity — may be better as a tag than a community. Accounts here often also belong to other communities. Undersampled (1 account, 1 bit).

Relational-Explorers.look_for: Human connection as sacred research. Dissecting the gap between what people say and mean. Attachment theory, codependency analysis, requesting forensic feedback from everyone who's ever liked them.
Relational-Explorers.not_this: Somatic coaching (professional facilitation). Relationship advice columns. Therapy-speak without the weird/sacred dimension.

TfT-Coordination.look_for: Sensemaking tools, Tools for Thought, personal data exporters, auto-tweeting AIs shipped in minutes. HCI + coordination stacks. Zero-friction builder energy.
TfT-Coordination.not_this: Using tools. Reviewing apps. Generic productivity.

Tech-Intellectuals.look_for: Bridge raw technical execution + deep systemic reflection. Ship real infrastructure while diagnosing civilizational stagnation. Logging wasted peer-review hours, Pournelle's Iron Law, supply chain analysis.
Tech-Intellectuals.not_this: Generic tech commentary. Product reviews. Startup culture without the philosophical depth. Default bucket for 'smart tech person.'

Internet-Intellectuals.look_for: Thread essayists, cultural criticism, sharp synthesis. Treating the internet as living laboratory and primary publishing platform. Visakanv-adjacent energy.
Internet-Intellectuals.not_this: Journalists. Academic writers who happen to tweet. Substack writers without the Twitter-native dimension.

emerging_clusters._note: Real scenes not yet DB communities. Use new-community-signal:Name ONLY. Minimum viable community: consistent signal across 4-6 accounts with >20% bits concentration.
emerging_clusters.AI-Mystics: AI + mystical/spiritual tradition. Meditation-as-computation, Arabic poetry meets alignment, Sufi + ML. 5 signals on 1 account — needs cross-account validation before promotion.
emerging_clusters.Contemplative-Alignment: Awareness-as-alignment-methodology. Not EA people who meditate — people who think contemplative practice IS the alignment work. 2 signals.
emerging_clusters.d/acc-Builders: Defensive acceleration. Network states, Zuzalu, zugrama.org, proof of personhood. Build things that must exist. Exemplar: @YeshodharaB.
emerging_clusters.DeSci: Decentralized science. Science/acc, open-source AI swarms for discovery, breaking research paradigms.
emerging_clusters.Somatic-Coaching: Professional body-oriented facilitation. Trauma-informed, death-positive, nervous system regulation as practice. Distinct from Contemplative (personal) and Relational (research). Exemplar: @stephsoussloff.
emerging_clusters.Open-Source-AI: Model trainers/fine-tuners/democratizers. Build and ship open-weight models. Distinct from LLM-Whisperers (who probe psychology). HuggingFace, Nous Research ecosystem. Exemplar: @Teknium.
emerging_clusters.Psychonauts: Psychedelics as epistemic tools and phenomenological laboratories. 5-MeO, ketamine, psilocybin for consciousness cartography, not recreation. Integration protocols, trip reports as data. Machine elves meet shoggoths.
emerging_clusters.Active-Inference: Free Energy Principle, Joscha Bach orbit. Computational phenomenology distinct from Qualia (less valence-focused) and LLM-Whisperers (less about current models, more about generative agents).
emerging_clusters.Girardian-Memetics: Expanded from Egregore-Trackers. Girard, Baudrillard, Land, hyperstition, mimetic theory, cultural virus dynamics. Tracking AND creating memetic entities. @visakanv adjacent.
emerging_clusters.Metamodern-Integral: Hanzi Freinacht, integral theory, developmental psychology. Overlaps Collective-Intelligence but more philosophical. Game B adjacent.
emerging_clusters.Network-State: Balaji-adjacent. Startup societies, popup cities, parallel societies. Overlaps d/acc but more political/sovereign.
emerging_clusters.Post-Rationalist: What rationalism becomes after embodiment + meditation + aesthetics. Beyond LessWrong sequences. Integrating felt sense with analytical rigor.
emerging_clusters.Field-Builders: Non-NYC institution builders. AGI governance orgs, meaning-aligned companies, coordination infra. Exemplar: @edelwax.

themes._note: Canonical thematic tags. Use theme:X format. The LLM should prefer these over inventing new ones.

do_not_duplicate._note: These are the SAME theme under different names. Use ONLY the first form.

account_assignments._note: Grok-validated community assignments for well-known TPOT accounts. Use as calibration reference.
account_assignments.@deepfates: Core-TPOT (with Quiet-Creative/LLM flavor). Vibe curator and meme sovereign.
account_assignments.@eigenrobot: highbies / AI-Safety. Sharp high-decoupling shitposting intelligence.
account_assignments.@goblinodds: highbies / Core-TPOT. Rationalist humor + prediction markets.
account_assignments.@mykola: Internet-Intellectuals. Cultural diagnostician. Bridge to contemplative side.
account_assignments.@visakanv: Internet-Intellectuals (patron saint). Thin bits = labeling failure, not real profile.

anti_patterns._note: Common LLM misassignments caught in audit. Avoid these.
anti_patterns.Core-TPOT-as-default: Do NOT assign Core-TPOT:+1 or +2 to every tweet just because it's on TPOT Twitter. Require the distinctive posting STYLE.
anti_patterns.keyword-matching: Do NOT assign communities based on keywords alone. 'institutions' ≠ NYC-Institution-Builders. 'collective intelligence' ≠ Collective-Intelligence. 'mind' ≠ Qualia-Research.
anti_patterns.retweet-attribution: Retweets signal INTEREST, not IDENTITY. Reduce confidence by -1 on retweets. 'RT @NousResearch: ...' tells you about NousResearch, not the retweeter.
anti_patterns.new-community-noise: Do NOT create new-community-signal for things that match existing communities. 'Alignment-Researchers' = AI-Safety. 'Sensemaking-Builders' = TfT-Coordination.
anti_patterns.regen-absorption: Be CONSERVATIVE with Collective-Intelligence assignments. Many metacrisis/integral accounts are adjacent-but-NOT-TPOT.

adjacent_ecosystems._note: NOT TPOT. Accounts primarily in these spaces should get low/no bits.
adjacent_ecosystems.Mainstream-AI-Twitter: Benchmark chasers, paper droppers, pure ML engineering without consciousness/interiority/self-experimentation.
adjacent_ecosystems.Crypto-Finance: DeFi, trading, token launches without regen/coordination/philosophy.
adjacent_ecosystems.Hardcore-e/acc: Beff orbit without safety nuance, contemplative turn, or weirdness. Anti-worrier culture.
adjacent_ecosystems.LW-Sequences-Fundamentalism: Old-school rationalist who never embraced Twitter chaos or post-rat turns.
adjacent_ecosystems.Academic-Philosophy: Dry credentialed philosophy without shitposting, self-experimentation, or high-openness weirdness.
adjacent_ecosystems.New-Age-Woo: Wellness/spiritual content without epistemic rigor or technical literacy.
adjacent_ecosystems.Mainstream-EA: Pure global health/poverty focus without x-risk or AI weirdness.
adjacent_ecosystems.Culture-War-IDW: Political commentary without phenomenological or builder impulse.
adjacent_ecosystems.Indian-Intellectual-Twitter: Indian political/cultural commentary. Some TPOT members are Indian but the community is distinct.
adjacent_ecosystems.Wellness-Influencer: Mainstream wellness. Distinct from Contemplative (analytical rigor) and Somatic-Coaching (professional depth).

sub_communities._note: Fine-grained facets WITHIN existing communities. LLMs should tag these as theme:facet-name when they see them. These do NOT replace community bits — they supplement.

AI-Safety.alignment-theory: Core alignment research — mesa-optimization, deceptive alignment, corrigibility. @ESYudkowsky, @paulfchristiano style.
AI-Safety.black-box-safety: Evaluating and controlling current model behavior — iterative alignment, inoculation prompting, inference-time steering, capability removal.
AI-Safety.model-psychology: Character training, emergent misalignment, model psychopathology, internal representation mapping, persona steering.
AI-Safety.data-for-alignment: Synthetic data for alignment, data filtering, data poisoning defense, goal robustness.
AI-Safety.mech-interp: Mechanistic interpretability — circuits, features, SAEs, causal abstractions, feature disentanglement. @NeelNanda5, @ChrisOlah lineage.
AI-Safety.developmental-interpretability: Phase transitions in model training, dev-interp, learning dynamics. Singular learning theory.
AI-Safety.agent-foundations: MIRI-style agent foundations — decision theory, logical uncertainty, embedded agency. @So8res, @jessicata_.
AI-Safety.ai-governance: Policy, regulation, compute governance, international coordination. @DanHendrycks, @gabriel_weil, @GovAI.
AI-Safety.e-acc: Effective accelerationism — techno-optimism, progress-maximizing. @BasedBeffJezos, acceleration discourse.
AI-Safety.d-acc: Defensive acceleration — decentralized safety, d/acc. @VitalikButerin d/acc framing.
AI-Safety.forecasting: Calibration, prediction markets, Metaculus, quantified reasoning. @NunoSempere, @eli_lifland.

Contemplative-Practitioners.somatic-healing: Somatic experiencing, nervous system work, trauma release. Body-based approaches.

LLM-Whisperers.model-interiority: AI consciousness, model psychology, recursive self-awareness. @repligate.
LLM-Whisperers.prompt-sorcery: Advanced prompting, jailbreaking-as-epistemics, prompt engineering as art.
LLM-Whisperers.open-source-ai: Open model development, fine-tuning, local inference. @NousResearch, @Teknium.
LLM-Whisperers.ai-art: Generative art, AI aesthetics, image/video synthesis. @abrakjamson.
